     if not candidates:

-        ns = _nums(s)

-        if len(ns) >= 4:

-            candidates.append(("bbox", ns[-4:]))

-        elif len(ns) >= 2:

-            candidates.append(("point", ns[-2:]))

+        # Prefer the last coordinate tuple in chatty generations.

+        tuples = re.findall(r"[\(\[]\s*([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)\s*,?\s+([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)\s*,?\s+([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)\s*,?\s+([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)\s*[\)\]]", s)

+        if tuples:

+            candidates.append(("bbox", [float(x) for x in tuples[-1]]))

+        else:

+            ns = _nums(s)

+            if len(ns) >= 4:

+                candidates.append(("bbox", ns[-4:]))

+            elif len(ns) >= 2:

+                candidates.append(("point", ns[-2:]))

     if not candidates:

         p = [image_w / 2.0, image_h / 2.0]

         return {"point": clip_point(p[0], p[1], image_w, image_h), "bbox": clip_bbox(bbox_from_point(p, image_w, image_h), image_w, image_h), "raw": s}

-            messages = [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "image", "image": img}, {"type": "text", "text": prompt}]}]

-            inputs = {k: (v.to(dev) if hasattr(v, "to") else v) for k, v in inputs.items()}

+        if not self.ok:

+            p = [image_w/2.0, image_h/2.0]

+        img = Image.open(image_path).convert("RGB")

+        prompt = make_prompt(instruction)

+        messages = [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "image", "image": img}, {"type": "text", "text": prompt}]}]

+        text = self.processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+        inputs = self.processor(text=[text], images=[img], return_tensors="pt")

+        inputs = {k: (v.to(self.device) if torch.is_tensor(v) else v) for k, v in inputs.items()}

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            out = self.model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=64, do_sample=False, num_beams=1)

+        in_len = int(inputs["input_ids"].shape[1])

+        gen = out[0, in_len:]

+        raw = self.processor.tokenizer.decode(gen, skip_special_tokens=True)

+        fw, fh = qwen_resized_dims(image_w, image_h)

+        return parse_grounding(raw, image_w, image_h, fw, fh)

+def freeze_except_last_layers(model, n=2):

+    for p in model.parameters():

+        p.requires_grad = False

+    num_layers = int(getattr(model.config, 'num_hidden_layers', 36))

+    start = max(0, num_layers - int(n))

+    trainable = 0

+    for name, p in model.named_parameters():

+        ok = False

+        for i in range(start, num_layers):

+            if name.startswith(f'model.layers.{i}.'):

+                ok = True; break

+        if ok:

+            p.requires_grad = True

+            trainable += p.numel()

+    return trainable

+

+
